case_title: PATEL, RAMANBHAI R. vs. SHERMER, GUY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMANBHAI R. AS TO DEFENDANT SHERMER, GUY DOOR, ELIZABETH DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
